---
name: Follow-on work
about: Propose or claim one of the open contribution items from FINDINGS.md / CONTRIBUTING.md
labels: enhancement
---

## Which contribution opportunity

Reference the section in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (e.g.
"1. Refined `CompliantWith` capturing sequential dependence")
or the FINDINGS.md cross-reference.

## Scope

What part of the opportunity will this cover? It is fine, and
expected, to scope down to a single layer (e.g. just modelling
stake, without yet refining `Voted`).

## Approach

Sketch the technical approach. What new structures, what new
lemmas, what existing files will be touched.

## Dependencies

Will this need Mathlib? A change to `Focil/Types.lean`? Anything
upstream?
